name: Witch Hunt: A Century of Murder
original_name: Witch Hunt: A Century of Murder
overview: Four hundred years ago, hundreds of innocent people were killed as an obsession to stamp out Satanism swept the British Isles. Dr Suzannah Lipscomb investigates the events of this dark period in our history.
